title: tomophyllum sesquipinnatum
intro: Tomophyllum sesquipinnatum is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, also known as the 'adder fern'. The medicinal properties of Tomophyllum sesquipinnatum include its ability to be used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, helping to reduce pain and swelling. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. Tomophyllum sesquipinnatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal purposes.
